title: Mech Trowel
description: A Trowel+ that randomizes / shuffle blocks with multiple customizable palettes. Includes building wand functionality. Works with Create /Copycats+ & FramedBlocks
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/D62NUIsgzCw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Mech Trowel**

A easy to use trowel to randomize which blocks to place, but with many advance options if you want it.


### What it does
It's got 3 modes you can switch between with R:
- **Quick** - Just places random blocks from your hotbar (like other trowel/shuffle mods)
- **Palette** - Uses custom palettes you make with percentage for each block
- **Wand** - Places multiple connected blocks at once (needs an upgrade item or change config)

### Main Features

**Palettes** - You can make up to 25 palettes with 28 blocks each. Set percentages for how often each block gets placed. Hold ALT to quickly switch between them.

**Gradients** - You can blend between multiple palettes to create smooth transitions. Has a GUI where you can set it up with different sections and blend modes. Works great with wand mode.

**Rotation Settings** - Lock blocks to face certain directions, control how stairs and slabs get placed.

**Replace Mode** - Replaces blocks instead of just placing on empty spaces. You can configure which blocks it's allowed to replace in the config or just disable replace mode entirely.

**Wand Mode** - Like other building wand mods but uses your palette blocks. Can place up to 64 blocks at once (or 128 with the upgrade). Has undo for the last 3 actions. Offhand can be used to change where blocks should be placed (Like on a grassblock instead of other palette blocks, work with replace too).

### Other stuff

- Works with Create and Copycats+ blocks - you can set the material and properties
- Works with FramedBlocks - you can set the material
- JEI, Curios and backpack mods support
- Finds blocks in shulker boxes and Sophisticated Backpacks
- Preview wireframes so you can see where blocks will go, and how far along the gradient you are
- Bunch of config options if you want to tweak things
- Chipped Auto-converstion upgrade that allows to use the base block from inventory/backpacks if the chipped variant isnt available in inventory/backpacks.
- AE2 upgrade, allowing you to use blocks from your ME system

### Controls

G opens the palette GUI, R switches trowel modes, ALT for quick palette menu.




I have made a seperate mod to make it work with deployers and rollers on trains and contraptions, so this mod dont need required dependencies: [https://modrinth.com/mod/create-randomize-filters](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-randomize-filters)
